---
title: "BCMS"
output:
  rmarkdown::html_vignette:
    toc: false
    number_sections: false
    fig_caption: yes
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{BCMS}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
---
# Overview
```{r model_family_header, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
acousticTS:::.model_family_header(
  family = "bcms",
  pages = c(
    Overview = "index.html",
    Implementation = "bcms-implementation.html",
    Theory = "bcms-theory.html"
  )
)
```

```{r bcms_overview, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
acousticTS:::.model_family_overview(
  family = "bcms",
  summary = paste(
    "The bent cylinder modal series solution (`BCMS`) extends the straight",
    "finite-cylinder modal family to uniformly bent cylinders by keeping the",
    "straight cross-sectional modal physics and modifying only the along-axis",
    "coherence."
  ),
  core_idea = paste(
    "Start from the finite-cylinder modal backscatter of a straight cylinder,",
    "then replace the straight-axis coherent length by the curved equivalent",
    "coherent length derived for a uniformly bent axis."
  ),
  best_for = c(
    "Uniformly bent fluid-like cylinders near broadside",
    "Curvature studies where the straight cylinder modal content remains the right local kernel",
    "Problems where a full curved-body rederivation is unnecessary or unavailable"
  ),
  supports = c(
    "Bent `Cylinder` geometries represented through a curvature ratio",
    "Monostatic near-broadside target strength",
    "The same fluid boundary families carried by the straight-cylinder modal kernel"
  ),
  assumptions = c(
    "Uniform curvature",
    "Near-broadside incidence",
    "Curvature modifies coherence along the axis but not the local cross-sectional modal physics"
  ),
  reading = c(
    "[Implementation](bcms-implementation.html): usage and current reference checks",
    "[Theory](bcms-theory.html): bent-axis coherence integrals and relation to the straight-cylinder modal kernel"
  )
)
```
